svg.style: width: 100%; height: auto; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); border-radius: 8px;
svg.title: OG image variante A — Vos tests utilisateurs en 5 jours
svg.desc: Image Open Graph 1200x630 avec le logo earlypanel, slogan "Vos tests utilisateurs en 5 jours", et URL earlypanel.fr

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; fill: #0A7A5A; letter-spacing: -0.02em;;fill:rgb(10, 122, 90);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:-apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:36px;font-weight:700;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
